_meta.note: v2 resubmission after §8.6 gate fail on v1. M08-A split into A1-A4 by seat-of-pride axis. M08-F/G replaced by set_aside blocks per researcher Option 2 direction.

subgroups.M08-A1: Heart-Elevation — Pride Seated in the Heart
subgroups.M08-A2: Eye-Elevation and Outward Bearing — Pride's Visible Register
subgroups.M08-A3: National and Collective Pride — Pride as a Corporate Inner Characteristic
subgroups.M08-A4: General Dispositional Pride — Individual Self-Elevation (Unspecified Seat)
subgroups.M08-B: Presumptuous Defiance — Pride as Willful Transgression
subgroups.M08-C: Boasting and Self-Display — Pride's Verbal and Public Form
subgroups.M08-D: Vain Conceit — Inflated Self-Estimate in the Mind
subgroups.M08-E: Pride of Power and Position — Arrogance in Strength, Wealth, and Authority

characteristic_map.M08-A1: CHAR-1 (Arrogant self-elevation) — split by seat_of_pride axis: heart
characteristic_map.M08-A2: CHAR-1 (Arrogant self-elevation) — split by seat_of_pride axis: eyes_bearing
characteristic_map.M08-A3: CHAR-1 (Arrogant self-elevation) — split by seat_of_pride axis: national_collective
characteristic_map.M08-A4: CHAR-1 (Arrogant self-elevation) — split by seat_of_pride axis: general_dispositional

vc_id_assignments._note: Non-A sub-groups carried forward from resolved-v1. M08-A vc_ids reassigned by CC from seat-of-pride term_assignments below. CC resolves verse references to vc_ids via the DB.

term_assignments_M08A_split._note: All former M08-A verses reassigned to A1/A2/A3/A4 by seat-of-pride axis. CC maps verse references to vc_ids from DB.

59_huperefania.rationale: Mar 7:22: pride constitutionally located in the heart as source of moral corruption

60_huperefanos.rationale: Luk 1:51 explicitly names thoughts of their hearts → A1; remaining 4 verses evidence general inner arrogance → A4

4440_hupselos.rationale: All 3 verses: proud inner orientation / high-mindedness — general dispositional

1587_filautos.rationale: 2Ti 3:2: self-love as root generating M08 — general dispositional

94_ge.rationale: Isa 16:6: settled inner disposition of self-importance — general

6037_gaah.rationale: Job 10:16: head being lifted up in pride — outward bearing (head/posture) register

95_geeh.rationale: Jer 48:29: heart explicitly named as pride's seat → A1. Isa 2:12: God's day targets everything proud and lofty (collective/cosmic judgment) → A3. Remaining 7 verses: individual proud person as general dispositional → A4.

96_geah_pride.rationale: Pro 8:13: pride as intrinsically evil opposite of fear of Lord — general

97_gaavah.rationale: Isa 9:9: 'pride and arrogance of heart' — heart named → A1. Psa 73:6: pride worn like necklace, outward display — bearing register → A2. Isa 13:11, 16:6, 25:11, Jer 48:29: Babylon/Moab national pride clusters → A3. Zep 3:11: the proudly exultant ones (collective) → A3. Remaining verses: individual arrogant will/agency → A4.

98_gaon.note: All M08-A verses of ga.on are in the national/collective pride register
98_gaon.rationale: 16 verses evidence national/collective pride (Babylon, Moab, Egypt, Israel, Assyria as collective subjects) → A3. 4 verses evidence individual dispositional pride (Job, Proverbs wisdom maxims) → A4. Primary A3.

99_geut.rationale: Psa 17:10: arrogant speech flows from closed, pitiless hearts → A1. Isa 28:1, 28:3: proud crown of Ephraim's leaders (collective/national leadership) → A3 (primary). Isa 26:10: wicked's inner perceptual faculty closed to LORD's majesty → A4.

100_gavah.rationale: Heart-idiom verses → A1: 2Ch 26:16 (heart turns destructive), 2Ch 32:25 (heart was proud), Psa 131:1 (heart deliberately held back), Pro 18:12 (heart's inner elevation), Jer 49:16 (pride of the heart soars), Eze 28:2 (prince of Tyre's heart proud, claimed divine status), Eze 28:17 (heart's pride triggered by beauty), Eze 31:10 (great tree's proud heart). Isa 3:16: daughters of Zion's ostentatious posture and wanton glances — bearing/eyes → A2. Eze 16:50, Obd 4, Zep 3:11: collective/national subjects → A3. Pro 17:19, Jer 13:15: general individual pride → A4.

101_govah.rationale: Heart-idiom verses → A1: 2Ch 32:26 (pride of his heart), Eze 31:10 (height the tree's heart was proud of). Eye/face-posture → A2: Psa 10:4 (haughty face-posture shutting out God). National collective → A3: Jer 48:29 (Moab's loftiness in pride cluster). Pro 16:18 (haughty spirit precedes fall) → A4.

5068_gavoah.rationale: Heart-seat verses → A1: 1Sa 16:7 (God looks at the heart over outward height), Psa 101:5 (haughty look + arrogant heart — heart named as constitutional seat), Pro 16:5 (arrogance in the heart). Eye/visibility → A2: Isa 5:15 (haughtiness expressed in the eyes). General dispositional → A4: 1Sa 2:3 (proud talk), Job 41:34 (Leviathan's self-assertion), Psa 138:6 (haughty at a distance), Ecc 7:8 (proud in spirit), Eze 21:26 (what is exalted brought low).

102_gavhut.rationale: Isa 2:11: haughtiness expressed in the looks of men; Isa 2:17: haughtiness of man humbled — both verses specify the visible/outward register of human haughtiness.

6038_gevah.rationale: Jer 13:17: people's pride driving community toward captivity — collective → A3. Job 22:29, 33:17: individual dispositional → A4.

103_gevah_dan.rationale: Dan 4:37: pride as habitual posture one walks in — general individual

113_zud.rationale: Dan 5:20: heart being lifted up and spirit hardening together — heart explicitly named as the seat of Belshazzar's pride

231_rahav_proud.rationale: Psa 40:4: proud inner disposition of arrogant self-assertion — general

6025_rum.note: M08-A verses only (~35V); M08-F verses handled in set_aside block
6025_rum.rationale: Heart-idiom → A1: Deu 8:14 (heart lifted up producing forgetfulness of God), Deu 17:20 (king's heart not to be lifted up above brothers), Dan 11:12 (heart exalted after military victory), Dan 11:36 (king exalts himself by his own will), 1Ki 11:26-27 (Jeroboam lifted hand = inner will in rebellion), Hos 13:6 (heart lifted up through prosperity), Eze 31:10 (heart proud of its height). Eye/posture → A2: Psa 18:27 (haughty eyes brought down), Pro 6:17 (haughty eyes first in list God hates), Pro 30:13 (lofty eyes and high-lifted eyelids), Psa 131:1 (eyes not raised high). National/collective → A3: Deu 32:27 (enemy's collective self-exaltation), Isa 2:12 (everything lifted up = universal/cosmic collective), Isa 10:33 (great ones brought low), Psa 12:8 (vileness exalted among humanity — collective moral state). General individual → A4: Exo 14:8 (Israelites high hand — assertive), Num 15:30 (high hand against God), 2Sa 22:28 (haughty individual), Psa 66:7 (rebellious not to exalt themselves), Psa 75:4-7 (complex on self-exaltation), Psa 75:10, Psa 138:6, Psa 140:8, Isa 14:13 (will declares intent to self-exalt), Isa 37:23, 2Ki 19:22, Pro 14:29, Ezr 9:6.

6027_rum_height.note: M08-A verses only (5V); Pro 25:3 handled in set_aside block
6027_rum_height.rationale: Heart-idiom → A1: Pro 21:4 (haughty eyes + proud heart — heart named), Isa 10:12 (arrogant heart + boastful look — heart named as primary seat), Jer 48:29 (haughtiness explicitly in Moab's heart). National collective → A3: Isa 2:11 (lofty pride of men will be humbled — universal), Isa 2:17 (lofty pride of men brought low — universal).

241_shachats.rationale: Job 41:34: Leviathan's daunting haughty boldness of spirit — general dispositional

6992_qomah.note: M08-A verses only (6V); Eze 19:11 in M08-E
6992_qomah.rationale: National/collective conquest-pride → A3: 2Ki 19:23 (Assyrian king's boasting of felling tallest cedars), Isa 10:33 (great in height hewn down = collective), Isa 37:24 (heights as object of boastful military campaign), Eze 31:10 (great tree's heart proud of height — national allegory), Eze 31:14 (ambition to tower — addressed as collective). 1Sa 16:7: what proud human judgment prizes in outward stature — general individual → A4.

59_huperefania_duplicate_note._note: Mar 7:22 may have 2 vc_ids per Phase 3 observation. CC: if 2 distinct vc_ids exist for this verse under mti_id=59, assign both to M08-A1.

set_aside._note: 174 verses formerly routed to holding sub-groups M08-F and M08-G. CC to apply is_relevant=0 with set_aside_reason via Phase 5.5 patch before Phase 6 fires. Reason codes below.

reason_codes.M22_REGISTER: non-M08 content — M22-register (divine majesty / God-directed exaltation); term STAYS in M08 via other verses (v2_8 §6.3.2)
reason_codes.NO_INNER_BEING: non-M08 content — narrative marker / neutral assertiveness; no inner-being state evidenced in this verse as an individual unit of analysis
